title: Data Science Basics Kit
topic: From raw data to interpretable decisions
key_points: Start with problem framing before model selection.
Use simple baseline metrics before advanced techniques.
Document assumptions and data quality risks explicitly.
Prefer interpretable outputs for educational settings.
practice_prompts: Describe one risk of training on biased data.
List two baseline metrics for binary classification.
Draft a mini lesson objective for confusion matrix interpretation.
Explain when a simpler model can be better than a complex one.
